governance_token.symbol: MKR (historically); Sky ecosystem materials may reference updated governance token naming
governance_token.voting_power_model: token-weighted with locked voting (MKR locked into voting contracts)

governance_polls.purpose: signal / resolution on a matter before enactment

executive_votes.vote_style: approval voting (continuous support for competing executive 'spells')
executive_votes.purpose: enact changes to the system state

token_locking.mechanism: MKR is locked into the voting system to participate
token_locking.cold_wallet_support: voting proxy contracts can allow separation of cold wallet custody from hot wallet voting

treasury.treasury_controller: Maker Protocol system (surplus buffer / protocol-controlled value) governed via executive votes
spending_mechanism: protocol parameter changes and collateral onboarding via executive spells
budget allocations to teams/contributors (varies by governance era)
notes: Maker-style governance often combines non-binding polls with binding executive votes that change protocol parameters.

rights: participate in polls and executive votes
cast votes on behalf of locked MKR

member_types.who: risk, governance, and protocol teams funded by governance

stages.purpose: enact changes; approval voting selects the active executive spell

proposal_activity.cadence_pattern: ongoing polls and executive votes; executive votes can change over time as support shifts

notes: separation of signaling (polls) and execution (executive votes) is a core safety/process feature

governance.pass_rule_executive: executive spell with highest ongoing approval becomes active (subject to system rules)

sources.title: MakerDAO Voting Proxy Contract (poll vs executive; approval voting; locking; hot/cold wallet separation)
Sky ecosystem / Maker community: How voting works (governance polls and executive votes)
Maker Protocol Technical Docs: Chief (approval voting mechanics)
